# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.

Prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
    <div class="container">
        <h1>{{ $post->title }}</h1>
        <p>{{ $post->content }}</p>

        @foreach ($comments as $comment)
            <div class="comment">
                {!! $comment->content !!}
                <span>Posted by: {{ $comment->user->name }} on {{ $comment->created_at->format('F d, Y') }}</span>
            </div>
        @endforeach

        <h2>Add a Comment</h2>
        <form action="{{ route('comments.store', ['post' => $post->id]) }}" method="POST">
            @csrf
            <textarea name="content" required></textarea><br>
            <button type="submit">Submit Comment</button>
        </form>
    </div>
@endsection
